case_title: UNITED STATES NATIONAL BANK vs. NELSON, LAURA L.

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, LAURA L.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF APPLICATION FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED STATES NATIONAL BANK SERVED APR-13-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, LAURA L.
APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED STATES NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, LAURA L.
